title: Stir Fry Lamb
description: A simple and flavorful lamb stir fry recipe. This dish is perfect for a quick weeknight dinner. Feel free to adjust the spice level to your liking.

ingredients.name: Lamb
ingredients.amount: 1 pound boneless lamb shoulder or leg, sliced into thin strips

instructions: Heat oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the sliced lamb and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the lamb from the skillet and set aside.
Add the sliced onion and minced garlic to the skillet and cook until softened, about 3-4 minutes.
Add the browned lamb back to the skillet and stir in the Jamaican jerk seasoning.
Cook for an additional 1-2 minutes, until the lamb is coated in the spice mixture.
Serve hot over rice or noodles.
Optional: serve with steamed vegetables or a side salad.
